Issues: Lack of distinct artistic originality: While the style is appealing, the concept of neon cityscapes is highly common. To maximize sales, the image would benefit from a more unique composition or specific thematic element.

IP Risk Management: The primary risk lies not in the image itself, but in the ownership rights of the creation. If this image was generated by an AI or is a derivative work, the user must ensure they have the necessary commercial licenses before selling it.
Technical Refinement: While the composition is strong, commercial quality often requires higher resolution and more refined lighting gradients to appeal to professional designers.
